Apply moderate control inputs in sequence - pitch up/down, roll left/right, rudder movements, and throttle adjustments. Maintain stable flight for at least 300 frames without crashing or entering a critical state. Test all control surfaces respond correctly to inputs. Aircraft should respond smoothly to all control inputs, maintain stable flight when controls are neutral, and show realistic physics behavior. Test succeeds if the aircraft remains airborne and controllable for the duration without errors or crashes. Testing successful landing sequence and mission completion. Verify that the aircraft can complete a full approach, deploy landing gear and flaps, touch down on the runway within acceptable parameters, and trigger the win condition properly. Align with runway centerline and touchdown gently with proper vertical speed and alignment. Game phase transitions to GAME_OVER_WIN with success message and performance metrics displayed. Testing emergency scenarios and system failure handling. Trigger random emergency scenarios during flight. Attempt to continue flight and landing with degraded systems. Test that emergencies affect aircraft handling (reduced power, control issues) and that UI properly indicates active emergencies and required actions. Emergencies are triggered randomly, displayed clearly in UI, affect aircraft performance appropriately, and can be managed by the player. Game remains playable but more challenging. Emergency resolution or successful landing despite failures should be possible. Testing fuel management system. Monitor fuel levels during extended flight with varying throttle settings. Test that higher throttle burns fuel faster. Verify aircraft weight and performance changes as fuel depletes. Test low fuel warning triggers and fuel exhaustion scenario. Fuel system properly tracks consumption, displays current levels in UI, affects aircraft weight/performance, shows warnings at low levels, and causes engine failure if fuel runs out. All fuel-related game mechanics function correctly without errors. Testing crash detection and game over conditions. Verify that crashes (terrain impact, excessive speed, wrong angle) are properly detected and trigger appropriate game over state with clear failure messaging. Test that each crash type is detected and causes game over with appropriate failure message. All crash scenarios properly detected and trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Clear feedback shows why the crash occurred. Player can restart using R key. Physics behaves realistically during crash without errors or game freezing. Testing instrument displays and navigation aids. Verify that altitude, speed, heading, vertical speed indicators update correctly and provide accurate information for navigation. Extreme Landings Pro

Pilot a realistic aircraft through challenging landing scenarios. Navigate using your instruments, manage critical systems like engines and flaps, and respond to emergencies. Complete missions by landing safely within strict parameters while dealing with system failures, weather conditions, and fuel management. Your goal is to touch down smoothly on the runway centerline with proper speed and alignment.

W/S: Pitch control (nose up/down) | A/D: Roll control (bank left/right) | Arrow Left/Right: Rudder (yaw control) | Arrow Up/Down: Throttle (engine power) | Space: Deploy/Retract landing gear | Shift: Toggle flaps (5 settings) | Z: Deploy spoilers | Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/Unpause | R: Restart from game over

TEST_5.test_description: Testing crash detection and game over conditions. Verify that crashes (terrain impact, excessive speed, wrong angle) are properly detected and trigger appropriate game over state with clear failure messaging.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: All crash scenarios properly detected and trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Clear feedback shows why the crash occurred. Player can restart using R key. Physics behaves realistically during crash without errors or game freezing.

TEST_6.test_description: Testing instrument displays and navigation aids. Verify that altitude, speed, heading, vertical speed indicators update correctly and provide accurate information for navigation. Test that ILS guidance appears when approaching runway.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Monitor all instrument readings during various flight maneuvers. Compare instrument values to actual aircraft state. Verify instruments update smoothly at 60 FPS. Test that ILS localizer and glideslope indicators appear and guide player toward runway when in approach phase.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: All instruments display accurate real-time data matching aircraft state. Readings are smooth and readable. ILS guidance activates at appropriate distance/altitude from runway and provides clear visual cues for proper approach path. No flickering or incorrect values.

TEST_7.test_description: Testing pause and restart functionality. Verify that ESC properly pauses/unpauses game, physics freeze during pause, and R key correctly resets all game state back to start screen without errors or memory leaks.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Start game, fly for a period, press ESC to pause. Verify all motion stops and UI shows pause state. Press ESC again to unpause and verify game resumes correctly. Then trigger game over and press R to restart, checking all state resets properly.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: Pause freezes all game logic and physics while maintaining display. Unpause seamlessly resumes from exact same state. Restart completely resets game state, clears all entities, returns to start screen, and allows new game to begin without any residual state from previous session.
